sale_confirmed: Recorded. Sold {quantity} {unit} of {item} for {currency} {total_amount}. Profit: {currency} {profit}. Stock: {remaining_stock} {unit}.
sale_low_stock_warning: Recorded sale. But warning: only {remaining_stock} {unit} of {item} left!
sale_out_of_stock: Recorded sale. But warning: {item} is now out of stock! Restock soon.
inventory_empty: You do not have any inventory yet.
daily_summary: Today: Revenue {currency} {total_revenue}, Costs {currency} {total_cost}, Expenses {currency} {total_expenses}. Profit: {currency} {net_profit}. {transaction_count} transactions. Best seller: {top_selling_item}.
weekly_report: This week: Total profit {currency} {total_profit}. Average {currency} {avg_daily_profit}/day. Best day: {best_day}. {total_transactions} transactions.
credit_profile: Over the last {period_days} days: average daily revenue {currency} {avg_daily_revenue}, average daily profit {currency} {avg_daily_profit}, active days {active_days}, consistency score {consistency_score}. Risk level: {risk_level}.
clarify: I didn't quite catch that. Could you say it again?
photo_unclear: I couldn't clearly read a transaction from that image. Please try another photo.
error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
welcome: Welcome to Susu Books! Tap the green button and tell me about your business.
